formulas.name: Ohm's Law
formulas.variables: V = Voltage, I = Current, R = Resistance
formulas.units: V = V, A = A, Ω = Ω
formulas.notes: Used to calculate voltage, current, or resistance given the other two.

formulas.name: Resistivity
formulas.variables: ρ = Resistivity, R = Resistance, A = Cross-sectional area, L = Length
formulas.notes: Used to calculate resistivity given resistance, area, and length.

formulas.name: Resistivity of a wire
formulas.variables: R = Resistance, ρ = Resistivity, L = Length, A = Cross-sectional area
formulas.notes: Used to calculate resistance given resistivity, length, and area.

formulas.name: Power in an electric circuit
formulas.variables: P = Power, V = Voltage, I = Current
formulas.notes: Used to calculate power given voltage and current.

formulas.name: Power in an electric circuit (alternative)
formulas.variables: P = Power, I = Current, R = Resistance
formulas.notes: Used to calculate power given current and resistance.

formulas.name: Current in a parallel circuit
formulas.variables: I = Total current, I1, I2, ..., In = Individual currents
formulas.notes: Used to calculate total current given individual currents in a parallel circuit.

formulas.name: Potential difference in a parallel circuit
formulas.variables: V = Potential difference, V1, V2, ..., Vn = Individual voltages
formulas.notes: Used to calculate individual voltages given the potential difference in a parallel circuit.
